response.justification: Bogdan brings 20 years of hands-on engineering experience and some relevant recent work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, but the role demands a Director-level individual contributor with deep, recognized AI expertise and a track record of advising strategic customers and shaping AI platform strategy at scale. His current seniority (Staff Engineer), absence of an advanced AI-related degree, and a body of work that skews toward implementation and tooling rather than strategic thought leadership create a significant gap against the principal-level expectations. The AI exposure is recent and operationally scoped, not the kind of recognized authority the role requires.
strengths: 20+ years of diverse full-stack and infrastructure engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput systems
Active involvement in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq, demonstrating current hands-on AI builder fluency
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective and conference speaker, showing some capacity for external thought leadership
concerns: No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in an AI-related field, missing a preferred qualification central to the role's credibility requirements
Current and prior titles (Staff/Senior Software Engineer) fall well short of Director-level IC seniority expected for this position
No evidence of advising strategic customers or partners on AI/cloud adoption, which is a core responsibility of this role
